---
title: "Penguins Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

## Row

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total penguins"
list(icon = "clipboard-data", color = "primary",
     value = nrow(penguins))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Species"
list(icon = "tags", color = "info",
     value = n_distinct(penguins$species))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Avg body mass (g)"
list(icon = "speedometer", color = "success",
     value = round(mean(penguins$body_mass_g, na.rm = TRUE)))
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Body mass by species"
ggplot(penguins, aes(x = species, y = body_mass_g, fill = species)) +
  geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Species", y = "Body mass (g)")
```

```{r}
#| title: "Bill length vs depth"
ggplot(penguins, aes(x = bill_length_mm, y = bill_depth_mm, color = species)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Bill length (mm)", y = "Bill depth (mm)", color = "Species")
```
